title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.2, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM, chat, or embedding backends.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-user support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial interactive CLI that wraps Ollama with chat history, prompt templates, and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Lightweight VS Code extension that uses Ollama models for inline code suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on any Kubernetes cluster.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama with Kotlin extensions and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Async Rust crate that provides strongly-typed bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Minimal Tauri-based desktop GUI for Ollama (Windows/Mac/Linux) with local storage chat history.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module to run Ollama containers in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation to install Ollama and desired models declaratively on NixOS or via home-manager.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# SDK for Ollama with .NET 8 examples and Blazor chat demo.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar for summarizing notes and Q&A without leaving the app.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that listens in channels/DMs and responds using any Ollama model; deploy via Docker.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Experimental Terraform provider to pull models and manage Ollama server settings as code.

title: ollama-r
summary: R wrapper for Ollama enabling native LLM calls inside RStudio or Shiny dashboards.
